---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something new or an improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?
<!-- Don't just describe the solution — explain the problem first -->

## What would you like to see?
<!-- Describe the feature. If it's based on an ICT concept or a specific method, name it -->

## Which part of the terminal does this affect?
<!-- e.g. ICT signals, Charts, Backtest, Risk Manager, Learn mode, etc. -->

## How often would you use this?
- [ ] Every session
- [ ] A few times a week
- [ ] Occasionally

## Anything else?
<!-- Screenshots, examples, references to ICT concepts, coach transcripts, etc. -->
